description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a series of large, round blue beads interspersed with smaller, multicolored beads. The necklace is strung in a symmetrical pattern, with the largest blue bead positioned at the center and gradually smaller beads extending toward the clasp. The beads appear to be made of glass or polished stone, giving them a glossy, reflective surface. The color palette transitions from deep blue at the center to lighter blue and then to purple and brown hues near the ends. The necklace is displayed on a white, fabric-covered bust stand, which highlights the vibrant colors and smooth texture of the beads. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, suitable for making a statement in urban fashion settings.
description: A vibrant beaded necklace with large blue and smaller multicolored beads, arranged symmetrically and displayed on a white bust. The glossy beads create a striking, colorful statement piece.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with the largest blue bead at the center and a symmetrical arrangement of smaller beads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and roundness of the beads, with the color gradient visible along the strand.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the clasp area and the smaller beads that form the back of the necklace.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the three-dimensional arrangement and bead spacing.
